# JS Dependencies

Loaded from CDN at runtime (pinned versions). If this UI grows, consider adopting a `package.json` + bundler setup.

| Package | Version | CDN URL |
|---|---|---|
| dagre | 0.8.5 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/dagre@0.8.5/dist/dagre.min.js |
| cytoscape | 3.30.2 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/cytoscape@3.30.2/dist/cytoscape.min.js |
| cytoscape-dagre | 2.5.0 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/cytoscape-dagre@2.5.0/cytoscape-dagre.js |
